tasks.title: Define Full Backup Data Schema in packages/import-export/src/schemas/fullBackupSchema.ts
tasks.description: Create a Zod schema for the full backup JSON format (AppExportData) in packages/import-export/src/schemas/fullBackupSchema.ts. The schema must validate all user data categories including vocabulary, sessions, mistakes, mock tests, content meta, user edits, and progress records. Use existing partial schemas for sub-entities and compose them into a comprehensive full backup schema. Export the schema for use in import validation.
acceptanceCriteria: Full backup schema covers all user data categories
Schema exports a Zod object named fullBackupSchema
Schema passes type checks and can parse sample full backup JSON

outputPlan.description: Zod schema for full backup JSON validation

metadata.inputContext: Needs knowledge of existing partial schemas and full backup JSON structure
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides validation schema for full backup import

tasks.title: Implement exportAllData() to produce full backup JSON in packages/storage/src/backup/exportAllData.ts
tasks.description: Implement the exportAllData() function in packages/storage/src/backup/exportAllData.ts that reads all user data from IndexedDB repositories (vocabulary, sessions, mistakes, mock tests, content meta, user edits, progress records) and returns a JSON object conforming to the full backup schema. Ensure data is serialized correctly and includes metadata such as export timestamp and version.
acceptanceCriteria: exportAllData() returns a JSON object matching full backup schema
All user data categories are included in the export
Function handles empty or missing data gracefully

outputPlan.description: Function to export all user data as full backup JSON

metadata.inputContext: Needs full backup schema and access to all repositories
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables exporting full user data backup

tasks.title: Implement importBackup() to import and merge full backup JSON in packages/storage/src/backup/importBackup.ts
tasks.description: Implement the importBackup(json: unknown, mode: 'merge' | 'overwrite') function in packages/storage/src/backup/importBackup.ts. The function must validate the input JSON against the full backup schema, then merge or overwrite existing data in IndexedDB repositories accordingly. Implement deduplication and conflict resolution logic for merging. Return an ImportResult summarizing imported records and errors.
acceptanceCriteria: importBackup validates input JSON against full backup schema
Supports both merge and overwrite modes
Merges data with deduplication and conflict resolution
Returns detailed ImportResult with counts and errors

outputPlan.description: Function to import and merge full backup JSON data

metadata.inputContext: Needs full backup schema and repository interfaces
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables importing full user data backup with merge support

tasks.title: Add import/export integration to ImportExportService in packages/import-export/src/ImportExportService.ts
tasks.description: Modify ImportExportService.ts to add methods exportAllData() and importBackup(json, mode) that delegate to packages/storage backup functions. Add validation using full backup schema before import. Implement error handling and progress reporting. Update service API to support full backup import/export flows.
acceptanceCriteria: ImportExportService exposes exportAllData() and importBackup() methods
Methods validate data and handle errors
Service integrates with storage backup functions

outputPlan.description: Service methods for full backup import/export

metadata.inputContext: Needs full backup schema and storage backup functions
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Exposes full backup import/export in application layer

tasks.title: Add UI components for Full Backup Export and Import in apps/web/src/features/settings/components/BackupImportExport.tsx
tasks.description: Create a React component BackupImportExport.tsx in apps/web/src/features/settings/components/ that provides UI for exporting full backup JSON file and importing from a JSON file. Include file picker, progress indicators, success/error messages, and mode selection (merge/overwrite) for import. Use ImportExportService methods for actual import/export operations. Follow existing UI style and accessibility standards.
acceptanceCriteria: UI allows user to export full backup JSON file
UI allows user to select and import JSON file with mode choice
Shows progress and success/error feedback
Integrates with ImportExportService methods

outputPlan.description: React component for full backup import/export UI
